subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Eternal Beloved, Who hath been and shall forever be, Who hath specially ordained the chalice of nearness and reunion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب بیزوالی را سزا است که لم یزل و لایزال کاس قرب و وصال را مخصوص
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
